_meta.description: Watchlist — the single source of truth for the full monitoring pipeline. Add a ticker here and EVERYTHING auto-follows on the next GitHub Actions run: financial data fetch, rDCF, VP scoring, technical signals, confluence, position sizing, Telegram alerts.
_meta.how_to_add: Copy any existing entry, change ticker/yahoo/akshare/exchange/names, set vp_seed to neutral defaults (vp:50, all dimensions:50), set last_updated to today. Push. Done.

vp_dimension_guide.expectation_gap: AUTO — computed from rdcf delta (our_growth vs implied_growth). Do not edit manually.
vp_dimension_guide.fundamental_accel: AUTO — computed from fin_*.json (NI/Rev ratio, GM trend, FCF quality). Do not edit manually.
vp_dimension_guide.narrative_shift: MANUAL — how much has the market narrative around this stock changed in our favour? 0=no change, 100=complete re-rating
vp_dimension_guide.low_coverage: MANUAL — inverse of sell-side coverage density. High score = few analysts = more edge. 0=everyone covers it, 100=nobody covers it
vp_dimension_guide.catalyst_prox: MANUAL — proximity to a near-term binary catalyst that could force thesis resolution. 0=no catalyst, 100=imminent

vp_seed.wrongIf_e: 1.6T mass production delayed beyond Q3 2026 OR NVDA+MSFT+GOOGL stock prices collectively drop >25% from ATH within 1 quarter (hyperscaler CapEx pullback proxy)
vp_seed.wrongIf_z: 1.6T量产推迟至2026年Q3后，或英伟达/微软/谷歌股价集体较ATH下跌>25%（超大规模CapEx削减代理指标）

concentration_seed.rationale_e: Optical transceivers are core (>90% revenue). Customer concentration with hyperscalers — NVDA + MSFT + GOOGL collectively likely majority of revenue. Single-product-category exposure. Tech-cycle correlated. High business-model concentration. [unvalidated intuition]
concentration_seed.rationale_z: 光模块为核心（>90%营收）。客户集中于超大规模厂商——英伟达+微软+谷歌可能合计占多数营收。单一产品品类敞口。与科技周期高度相关。业务模式集中度高。[未验证直觉]

300308.SZ.narrative_shift_rationale: 1.6T SiPh transceiver narrative fully mainstream — NVIDIA Blackwell, Google TPU v5, Azure all adopted. Shifted from 'will they qualify' to 'market leader in next-gen optics'. Raised from 65→72.
300308.SZ.low_coverage_rationale: Mid-tier A-share components company. Moderate sell-side coverage from electronics analysts but niche enough to retain some edge. Held at 50.
300308.SZ.catalyst_prox_rationale: 1.6T volume ramp is near-term. 192% revenue growth validates. Slightly reduced 85→80 as primary catalyst (certification) is now delivered; next catalyst is volume scale.

vp_seed.wrongIf_e: New gaming approval freeze lasting >3 months OR revenue_growth < -5% for 2 consecutive quarters (consumption weakens proxy)
vp_seed.wrongIf_z: 游戏版号审批暂停>3个月，或连续两季度营收增速<-5%（消费下行代理指标）

concentration_seed.rationale_e: Highly diversified across gaming, online ads, fintech (WeChat Pay), cloud, and social platforms. No single segment exceeds ~35% of revenue. Customer base is hundreds of millions of consumers + enterprise. Low business-model concentration. [unvalidated intuition]
concentration_seed.rationale_z: 高度多元化：游戏、广告、金融科技（微信支付）、云、社交平台。没有单一板块超过营收35%。客户基础为数亿消费者+企业。业务模式集中度低。[未验证直觉]

700.HK.narrative_shift_rationale: Recovery narrative intact (PE 12.7x, buybacks, AI features) but fully absorbed. No incremental shift. Slight reduction 75→70.
700.HK.low_coverage_rationale: Most covered HK stock. Zero alpha from coverage gap. Reduced 40→35.
700.HK.catalyst_prox_rationale: Q1 earnings + WeChat AI premium tier launch ongoing. No single binary event near-term. Reduced 60→58.

vp_seed.wrongIf_e: earnings_growth < -30% for 2 consecutive quarters OR Japan revenue contribution fails to reach 15% of total by Q4 2026
vp_seed.wrongIf_z: 连续两季度盈利增速<-30%，或日本营收贡献未在2026年Q4前达到总收入15%

concentration_seed.rationale_e: Online games dominate (~70% revenue). Multiple game franchises (Identity V, Marvel Rivals, Justice, etc.) reduce single-game risk. Music + education + e-commerce add some segment diversification. Customer concentration low (millions of gamers). Moderate business-model concentration. [unvalidated intuition]
concentration_seed.rationale_z: 在线游戏占主导（约70%营收）。多个游戏IP（第五人格、漫威争锋、逆水寒等）降低单一游戏风险。音乐+教育+电商增加少量板块多元化。客户集中度低（数百万玩家）。业务模式集中度中等。[未验证直觉]

9999.HK.narrative_shift_rationale: Marvel Rivals DAU has declined from peak. Earnings growth -29.2% undermines 'NetEase can build global hits' thesis. Japan expansion still ongoing but unproven at scale. Reduced 50→45.
9999.HK.low_coverage_rationale: Less covered than Tencent, more edge from smaller analyst community. Slight increase 45→48.
9999.HK.catalyst_prox_rationale: Next game launch + Japan DAU/MAU data + Q1 earnings. Near-term but no single decisive event. Reduced 65→60.

vp_seed.wrongIf_e: CELESTIAL Phase 3 uMRD data disappoints (<50% rate) OR Brukinsa US BTK inhibitor market share drops below 15% OR revenue_growth < 20% for 2 consecutive quarters
vp_seed.wrongIf_z: CELESTIAL三期uMRD数据不及预期(<50%)，或布鲁替尼美国BTK市占率跌破15%，或连续两季度营收增速<20%

concentration_seed.rationale_e: Brukinsa is the primary commercial asset (~80% of revenue per public filings). Pipeline depth exists (15+ drugs) but only Brukinsa is materially revenue-generating today. Single-asset clinical exposure plus the upcoming CELESTIAL Phase 3 binary make business-model concentration high. [unvalidated intuition]
concentration_seed.rationale_z: 泽布替尼是主要商业化资产（占营收约80%）。管线深度存在（15+药物）但目前仅泽布替尼实质性贡献营收。单一资产的临床敞口加上即将到来的CELESTIAL三期二元事件使业务模式集中度偏高。[未验证直觉]

6160.HK.narrative_shift_rationale: Brukinsa is now the #1 BTKi globally in new patient share across multiple markets. Narrative shift from 'Chinese biotech' to 'globally competitive oncology platform' is real and underappreciated. Raised 68→75.
6160.HK.low_coverage_rationale: Biotech requires specialist knowledge — many generalists skip it. More coverage gap than large-cap HK stocks. Raised 45→55.
6160.HK.catalyst_prox_rationale: CELESTIAL data readout is a major near-term binary catalyst with large thesis resolution potential. Raised 70→78.

vp_seed.wrongIf_e: revenue_growth < -10% for 2 consecutive quarters (tariff impact proxy) OR gross_margin drops below 15% OR earnings_growth < -40%
vp_seed.wrongIf_z: 连续两季度营收增速<-10%（关税冲击代理指标），或毛利率跌破15%，或盈利增速<-40%

concentration_seed.rationale_e: Auto/NEV dominates (~80% revenue) but multiple segments (cars, batteries, electronics, semiconductors). Geographic spread broad (China + global expansion). Customer base diversified across consumers + B2B fleet + battery customers. [unvalidated intuition]
concentration_seed.rationale_z: 汽车/新能源车占主导（约80%营收）但有多个业务板块（车、电池、电子、半导体）。地理分布广（中国+全球扩张）。客户基础多元化（消费者+B端车队+电池客户）。[未验证直觉]

002594.SZ.narrative_shift_rationale: Global EV champion narrative under severe pressure: EU tariffs, revenue -13.5%, earnings -40.5%, margin compression. The story is breaking down. Reduced 45→38.
002594.SZ.low_coverage_rationale: Extremely well-covered A-share stock. Zero coverage edge. Reduced 35→32.
002594.SZ.catalyst_prox_rationale: Monthly sales data (potential positive surprise) but no major structural catalyst near-term given tariff headwinds. Reduced 50→45.
